signals.headline: Russia-Ukraine Easter Ceasefire Announced and Effected | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia-Ukraine Easter Ceasefire Announced and Effected | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Russian President Vladimir Putin announced a unilateral Easter ceasefire in Ukraine from 4:00 p.m. Moscow time on April 11 until midnight April 12, 2026, instructing forces to halt operations while remaining ready for defense; it took effect as stated, with reports of an agreed prisoner exchange set for Saturday.[1]

signals.headline: Iran-US Ceasefire Falters with Failed Talks and Continued Violations | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran-US Ceasefire Falters with Failed Talks and Continued Violations | NO | HIGH confidence**  
An initial Iran-US-Israel ceasefire from April 8 collapsed by April 10-12, with mutual violations, Strait of Hormuz still blocked, no agreement on nuclear issues or talks after 21-hour negotiations in Pakistan ended without deal, and US imposing a naval blockade.[1][3][4]
